text.title: Paid Acquisition Growth Strategy Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals. Every leaf points to a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are unit economics defined (LTV + margin + payback)?

conclusion.verdict: LinkedIn + Google Search; Meta only with brand-led B2B
Meta + Google Search; LinkedIn only with high-LTV B2B niche

text.example: LTV $2400, margin 70%, payback 6mo, ICP B2B → LinkedIn + Google Search.
